title: Chitra — Taste is the product
logline: The industry builds renderers; Chitra builds judgment.
narrativeArc: Setup: everyone renders. Tension: nobody directs. Peak: the investment chart makes the imbalance undeniable. Release: Chitra closes the loop.

creativeConcept.resolution: Chitra invests in direction and critique
creativeConcept.visualThesis: One imbalanced chart makes the argument visible

requirements.description: Render one typographic chart as the visual argument
requirements.approach: Use native text and chart elements
requirements.acceptanceTest: The chart owns the hierarchy without competing heroes

objective.primary: Show why directed video is different

scenes.shotIntent: The viewer's eye goes straight to the chart; the Critique bar's smallness IS the argument.
scenes.heroMoment: The investment chart dominates the frame and the tiny Critique bar lands the thesis.
